title: ruellia subringens
intro: Ruellia subringens is a type of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family, commonly known as the blue trumpet or Mexican petunia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ruellia subringens include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Ruellia subringens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
